text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That cheese my mom sent sure was tasty…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It was so rich… Really gave me a craving 
for some fresh milk straight from the cow…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's it! Trainer, what if we 
raised dairy cows on campus?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We could use the cow pies as fertilizer for the 
fields too♪ And while we're at it, why don't 
we raise some chickens and pigs ——

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, wait, then I guess it'd be more 
of a farm than a school, huh…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Awww… I thought I had a pretty 
good thing going there…
